title: Class method 'get_inst_coverage' not found in class 'cgArgs'
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

What would you like added/supported?

`get_inst_coverage()`

```
./test_regress/t/t_covergroup_args.py

%Error: t/t_covergroup_args.v:18:14: Class method 'get_inst_coverage' not found in class 'cgArgs'
                                   : ... note: In instance 't'
                                   : ... Suggested alternative: 'get_coverage'
   18 |         cov2.get_inst_coverage();
      |              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-43-g63993436c
```

Can you attach an example that runs on other simulators?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

```
git diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_covergroup_args.v b/test_regress/t/t_covergroup_args.v
index fdd1eb144..3b18df212 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_covergroup_args.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_covergroup_args.v
@@ -15,5 +15,6 @@ module t;
     function x();
         cov1.sample();
         cov2.get_coverage();
+        cov2.get_inst_coverage();
     endfunction;
 endmodule
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
